judge_result.short_rationale: Core eye-rinsing action is correct and usable, but it misses the required detail to remove contact lenses after the first 5 minutes, and changes escalation from calling a physician/poison center immediately to going to a doctor/ER. It also adds unsupported advice about not rubbing the eye or using eye drops.
